.github/workflows/maven-publish.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use Java 17 for the Maven Central repository setup job.

.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use Java 17 instead of Java 11 to match the target JDK version.

maven-plugin/src/test/java/de/redsix/dmn.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for Java 11+ compatibility.

plugin-base/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnc.after: if (element instanceof Rule rule) { return prettify(rule); }

plugin-base/src/test/java/de/redsix/dmnc.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for string interpolation.

            return element;
